output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?winner ?winnerLabel ?date WHERE {
  ?edition wdt:P155 wd:Q14145026 .
  ?edition wdt:P1545 ?winner .
  ?edition wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?winner wdt:P27 wd:Q30 .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
output.answer: The last time an American won the New York Marathon was in 2009, when Meb Keflezighi (Q57834) won the race.
